final_answer: Execution release binding is EXECUTION_RELEASE_PENDING per explicit source language in EHS-NOV-042. Policy STD-NOV-042-P requires the execution release to match chemical, quantity band, facility, and purchase order before PO issuance. SRC-NOV-042 is explicitly scoped to supplier quote collection and does not authorize execution. No source record supplies a closed execution release; EHS-NOV-042 confirms execution release remains to be scheduled. Policy boundary not satisfied.
